title: SOL 4pk Large Collagen Chewy Knots Chicken, 15 cm Tasty Dog Chews, Savoury Knotted Dog Treats for Large Dogs, High Protein Chicken Flavour Chews, Promotes Dental Health, Boredom Breaker
features: Dog Collagen for Health - Made from whole collagen, these bones for dogs help support joint health and promote a shiny coat and healthy skin, making them ideal as large dog bones to provide essential nutrients and supports dog overall well-being.

Long-Lasting Chews - Designed for extended chewing, these long lasting dog chews provide durable entertainment for dogs of all sizes. These dog chews large satisfy natural chewing instincts and keep your dog engaged and happy.

Delicious Chicken Flavour - Infused with a rich chicken flavour that dogs love, these dog chews are irresistible, whether you're treating your dog to a large dog bone or looking for savoury & rich chicken flavour dog chew bones for snack time.

Supports Dental Health & High Protein - These dog chews not only help reduce plaque & tartar buildup for cleaner teeth & fresher breath, but they also provide a high-protein boost, perfect for keeping your dog entertained & energised.
Pet Reminder - Please ensure fresh drinking water is available and your dog is monitored whilst it enjoys these treats
